theme: AI/Hyperscaler-Driven Optical Fibre & Telecom Infra Buildout
why: Global hyperscalers have committed $660-700bn in capex for 2026 with AI data centres requiring ~36x more fibre than traditional racks, driving a structural re-rating of Indian OFC manufacturers with long-term supply contracts.

early.why: Vertically integrated OFC maker, still undervalued vs peers
Secured long-term hyperscaler OFC supply agreement
Owns stake in Birla Furukawa fibre optics JV
Telecom tower infra, leveraged to 5G densification

theme: India Defence Indigenisation & Make-in-India Capex Surge
why: India cleared a $40bn military modernisation plan in Feb 2026 and defence exports surged 62.66% YoY in FY26, flooding private-sector defence and electronics manufacturers with fresh order inflows.

early.why: Precision defence components, order book building
Drone maker on indigenisation positive list

why: Global supply chain diversification away from China, anti-dumping relief on select molecules, and new chemical park investments are unlocking margin recovery and fresh CRAMS/export contracts for Indian specialty chemical players.

early.why: Export-heavy platform, Zone IV ramp underway
CDMO expansion cycle, margin inflection due
Large LOI book, revenue growth accelerating
Specialty CDMO scaling, intermediates drag fading

theme: Healthcare CDMO & Domestic Pharma Volume Recovery
why: A combination of US generics pricing stability, PLI-backed bulk drug park investments, and post-Covid chronic-therapy volume recovery is driving broad-based earnings upgrades across Indian pharma and contract manufacturers.

early.why: Already moved but API export cycle still early
High-value API CDMO, capacity expansion live
API turnaround play, underowned on recovery path
